--- 
image: Beatta.png 
description: Research and Community Engagement Practitioner 
categories: ['C&E team', 'UNSW']
date: "14 Feb 2026"
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-width: 10em 
  image-shape: round 
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn 
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/beatta-zarrabi-45936a9b/ 
title: Beatta Zarrabi 
language: 
  title-block-published: "Joined in"
--- 

Beatta Zarrabi (UNSW) is a research and community engagement practitioner at UNSW with experience in developing and supporting collaborative research communities across interdisciplinary projects. Her work focuses on aligning user needs, stakeholder engagement, and project delivery to strengthen adoption and long-term impact of research tools and workflows.
